mapper.select:
SELECT VOCM.GATE_CD , VOCM.VC_NO , VOCM.COMPANY_CD , VOCM.SUBJECT , VOCM.VOC_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'MP053', VOCM.VOC_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS VOC_TYPE_NM , VOCM.PROGRESS_CD , GETCOMCODE(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'MP052', VOCM.PROGRESS_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_NM , VOCM.REQ_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS REQ_USER_TYPE , VOCM.REQ_COM_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_COM_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_COM_NM , (VOCM.REQ_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REQ_DATE , (VOCM.PH_DATE , 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS PH_DATE , (VOCM.RECV_DATE , 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS RECV_DATE , (VOCM.CD_DATE , 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS CD_DATE , (VOCM.DS_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DS_DATE , VOCM.DS_USER_ID , getUserName(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.DS_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS DS_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.DS_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS DS_USER_TYPE , VOCM.ORDER_NO , VOCM.ITEM_CD , VOCM.RUB_TYPE , getComCode(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'MP054', VOCM.RUB_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS RUB_TYPE_NM , VOCM.VOC_OBJ , VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_COM_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VOC_OBJ_NM FROM STOCVOCM VOCM WHERE VOCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VOCM.VIEW_TYPE = 'VOC' AND VOCM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND VOCM.VOC_OBJ = 'USNI' AND VOCM.PROGRESS_CD != '100'
AND VOCM.REQ_DATE >= (#{START_DATE}) AND VOCM.REQ_DATE <= (#{END_DATE})
AND VOCM.PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD}
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REQ_USER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(VOCM.REQ_COM_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REQ_COM_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_COM_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REQ_COM_NM}) '%'
AND VOCM.VOC_TYPE = #{VOC_TYPE}
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.DS_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{DS_USER_NM}) '%'
AND VOCM.SUBJECT LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
AND VOCM.REQ_RMK LIKE '%' UPPER(#{REQ_RMK}) '%'
ORDER BY VOCM.VC_NO DESC

SELECT VOCM.VC_NO , VOCM.COMPANY_CD , VOCM.REQ_COM_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_COM_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_COM_NM , VOCM.REQ_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.REQ_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS REQ_USER_NM , (VOCM.REQ_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REQ_DATE , CVUR.DEPT_CD , CVUR.DEPT_NM , VOCM.VOC_TYPE , GETCOMCODE(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'MP053', VOCM.VOC_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS VOC_TYPE_NM , (VOCM.PH_DATE , 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS PH_DATE , VOCM.VOC_OBJ , VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.VOC_OBJ_SUP_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VOC_OBJ_SUP_NM , VOCM.ORDER_NO , VOCM.ITEM_CD , VOCM.SUBJECT , VOCM.REQ_RMK , VOCM.ATTACH_FILE_NO , (VOCM.RECV_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS RECV_DATE , VOCM.PROGRESS_CD , VOCM.PROGRESS_CD AS ORG_PROGRESS_CD , GETCOMCODE(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'MP052', VOCM.PROGRESS_CD, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_NM , VOCM.DS_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(VOCM.GATE_CD, VOCM.DS_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS DS_USER_NM , (VOCM.CD_DATE , 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS CD_DATE , (VOCM.DS_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS DS_DATE , GETCOMCODE(VOCM.GATE_CD, 'MP054', VOCM.RUB_TYPE, 0, #{ses.langCd}) AS RUB_TYPE , VOCM.DF_RMK , VOCM.DS_ATTACH_FILE_NO FROM STOCVOCM VOCM LEFT JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = VOCM.GATE_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = VOCM.REQ_USER_ID) WHERE VOCM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VOCM.COMPANY_CD = #{COMPANY_CD} AND VOCM.VC_NO = #{VC_NO} AND VOCM.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO , CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , CVUR.USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_VOC_CMPL' '@@' CUST.GATE_CD '@@' #{VC_NO} AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCCVUR CVUR JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND CVUR.COMPANY_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE CVUR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CVUR.USER_ID = #{REQ_USER_ID} AND CVUR.USER_TYPE = 'B'
